title: Better file management across account
excerpt: We need better file management solutions. What would be appreciated would be a storage management screen in the admin settings that allows you to see all the files on the account and allow you to select files on mass to …

posts.author: RiverJohnson (River Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml: We need better file management solutions. What would be appreciated would be a storage management screen in the admin settings that allows you to see all the files on the account and allow you to select files on mass to delete and export. Also, automatic rules such as delete all files older than X time continuously or export files older than X every so often.

posts.author: kilomray (Kilomray)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @RiverJohnson We recently built an app for monday.com to solve this exact issue. It’s called Storage Saver , and it helps free up storage by offloading board files to Google Drive. You can set it to run automatically or on a schedule. Once files are offloaded, links to them are added directly to the corresponding items, so nothing gets lost. We can implement additional capabilities like full removal of the old files, if needed. Please contact us at support@kilomray.com
